red_flags: Candidate is located in Jakarta, Indonesia, whereas the job requires hybrid work in Milan, Italy
The daily rate of 250€ for a freelance contract is highly unlikely to support international relocation
reasoning: Technically, the candidate is an outstanding match with over 8 years of experience covering almost all must-have and nice-to-have requirements. However, the role requires hybrid attendance in Milan, Italy, making it logistically impossible for a candidate based in Indonesia.
